parameters.jsCode:
const config = $input.item.json;
return config.accountIds.map(accountId => ({ json: { ...config, accountId } }));

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 1000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ parent: { database_id: $json.notionDatabaseId }, properties: { 'Payee': { title: [{ text: { content: $json.suggestion.payee } }] }, 'Status': { select: { name: 'Pending' } }, 'Suggested Category': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: $json.suggestion.category || '' } }] }, 'Pattern': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: $json.suggestion.patternDesc || '' } }] }, 'Confidence': { select: { name: $json.suggestion.confidence || 'Medium' } }, 'Notes': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: $json.suggestion.reason || '' } }] } } }) }}
